programs.title: The Weekly Kick-Off
programs.desc: The Weekly Kick Off covers all the hits, misses, and talking points from the A-Leagues, Australia's National teams, and  the Matildas and Socceroos.

programs.title: Bull
programs.desc: Bull is hired by a doctor, Samir Shadid, who's accused by the Manhattan US attorney of bribing his way into college, just as Bull's ex-wife, Isabella, is due to give birth.

programs.title: JAG
programs.desc: Political pressures come into play after an F-14 pilot clips a ski helicopter during a NATO exercise over Italian airspace, killing six civilians.

programs.title: Home Shopping
programs.desc: A show that offers a variety of product demonstrations and great deals for consumers looking to buy them.
